name: System Time Discovery Activity
notes: This rule detects system time discovery activity.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success
when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%net time%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%w32tm /tz%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%get-date%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%time%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY System Time Discovery Activity on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success
AND when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%net time%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%w32tm /tz%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%get-date%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%time%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: System Time Discovery Activity
Event description: Detects system time discovery activity.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
